postconditions: result == ((!input.tx_index_present || (input.receipt_present && input.included_loc_present && input.index_matches_loc)) && (!input.receipt_present || (input.tx_index_present && input.included_loc_present && input.receipt_matches_loc)) && (!input.included_loc_present || (input.tx_index_present && input.receipt_present && input.index_matches_loc && input.receipt_matches_loc && input.loc_points_to_block_tx)))
acceptance_criteria: For an included tx, tx_index implies receipt and included location, receipt implies tx_index and included location, and included location implies tx_index, receipt, matching positions, and the block slot containing the same tx.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core --test p0_safety && cargo test -p ic-evm-gateway gateway_submit_ic_tx_adapter_preserves_queue_and_receipt_invariants && cargo test -p ic-evm-gateway replacement_old_tx_is_not_staged_or_included
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core bidirectional pure tests plus gateway receipt/index/location adapter evidence
